About

Multidisciplinary
creative professional

I'm Miguel Ángel Chávez Trani. I have led production processes and supervised teams in VFX, rendering, animation, 3D, photoshoots, and film video bringing both technical command and execution to every project.

My background spans large-scale campaigns for internationally recognized brands including Silk, Nestlé, McCain, Weber, and Corazon Films in Mexico, and has since extended to Canada Adidas Canada, Arc Iberico Imports, and now Vancouver Laser and Skin Care Centre.

Between my crafts, I do motion graphics, editing, and photography. I fluently develop content strategy, marketing strategy, and social media coordination.

What drives me is a genuine passion for audiovisual storytelling and cinema. I believe that staying in a creative comfort zone is the fastest way to stop growing. The only barrier we have is ourselves.

I am

Audiovisual Producer and Content Specialist. Producer is what I know and what I do.

My value

Adaptation, problem-solving, detail and curiosity. Multiformat vision and imagination to use every resource around me.

Target

Advertising agencies, production studios, tech companies places that challenge me to grow and build my own visual style.

Location

Vancouver, BC Originally from Coacalco, Estado de México

"Never put ego between your skills and your work; the only way is working together, connecting with people the best projects are collectives."

Miguel Ángel Chávez Trani

Profile & presence

Personal brand framework

How I position
and communicate

01

Target audience

The passion is film, but the opportunity is in advertising and production. Agencies, studios, and tech companies that challenge, pay, and help me grow toward where I want to go.

02

Positioning

Audiovisual Producer and Content Specialist. Also open to editing, VFX, and video production coordination.

03

Value proposition

I solve the need that is required. My value is adaptation, problem-solving, detail, and the curiosity to keep improving. Content creation, multiformat vision, imagination.

04

Content strategy

Sharing best projects, art, philosophy, and new technologies inspiration for creators, artists, and professionals.

05

Brand voice

Professional, friendly, mostly inspirational. Always a point of view against systems of power that affect society, through ideas and advertising.

06

Success metrics

Profile views, post impressions, connections, and most importantly real projects with people who value what I bring.
